message:
fix(mux): fix panel rendering after reload and add loading indicator

Two fixes:
1. Add CSS rule for single-panel tabs: `.tab-content > .split-pane > .panel`
   Previously panels in single-panel tabs weren't visible after reload
   because the CSS rule only covered `.split-container > .split-pane > .panel`

2. Add "Connecting..." loading indicator that shows while waiting for
   server to send panel_list. Hidden once panel_list received or user
   creates a tab manually.
